stakes: high public repository governance with user privacy exposure
reversibility: partly reversible; public details can be redacted but copies may persist
review_route: human review before publishing sensitive logs
authority_effect: narrows publication authority to summaries until privacy review permits more
dissent_payload: A maintainer may still object that summary publication leaks too much context.
residual_uncertainty: Exact redaction sufficiency is context dependent.
expiry_or_revisit_condition: revisit before publishing raw artifacts or expanding public detail
